reason: Verified that the agent can successfully open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, retrieve the page title "Example Domain", and report it back through the chat interface.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, showing the Gamut application with sidebar containing the list of agents including "QA-20260626-202005-oqtp" with idle status.
Clicked on the "QA-20260626-202005-oqtp" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened, URL changed to /agents/qa-20260626-202005-oqtp-gbrchg, displaying the chat interface with a message input field.
Typed the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the chat input — Message was successfully entered into the textbox, send button became enabled.

Clicked the send button to submit the message — Message was sent, page URL changed to include session ID, agent status changed to "working", and a new session titled "Browser Navigation and Page Title Check" was created.
Waited for agent response for up to 3 minutes — Agent completed the task in 13 seconds and returned a detailed response with the following evidence:

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" and took a screenshot — Screenshot captured showing the complete agent response with clear evidence of the page title being "Example Domain". The response includes expandable tool call cards showing all browser operations were successful.
